Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Leslie Riley, Esq., for Chotsani Hilt, Petitioner.

The matter is called. No objections are presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Lost will dated Jan-05-2010 is admitted to probate. Chotsani Hilt is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
